intended_use: The ECHELON Synergy System is an imaging device and is intended to provide the physician with physiological and clinical information, obtained non-invasively and without the use of ionizing radiation.
intended_use_full: The ECHELON Synergy System is an imaging device and is intended to provide the physician with physiological and clinical information, obtained non-invasively and without the use of ionizing radiation. The MR system produces transverse, coronal, sagittal, oblique, and curved cross-sectional images that display the internal structure of the head, body, or extremities.
ground_truth: For DLR Symmetry: phantom testing and blinded radiologist review (3 US board-certified radiologists) comparing conventional reconstruction to DLR Symmetry. For AutoPose: evaluation by 3 certified radiological technologists.
other_metrics: DLR Symmetry: artifact reduction measured by Normalized Root Mean Square Error (NRMSE); SNR, Relative Edge Sharpness, and Contrast Change Rate showed no degradation. Radiologist comparison on 3-point scale showed statistically significant superior performance (p<0.05) for artifact reduction, SNR, image sharpness, lesion conspicuity, and overall image quality. AutoPose: almost all cases (specific percentage not provided) achieved automatic slice positioning without manual adjustment across Shoulder, Knee, HipJoint, Abdomen, Pelvis (male/female), and Cardiac.
